content: اِلحَجاَت كاَنَت هَتَبقَى مُختَلِفَة لَو كاَن عاَيِش
translations: eng:things would be different if Naasir were alive

transcriptions.arabizi: ilhagaet kaenit hatib'a muchtallifa law naasir kaen Aaeyish
